title: product_variables
description: Declares the input fields the engine needs and their legal values. The engine reads defaults from here before applying user-provided values. Scope determines where the variable lives in the canonical payload: 'job' (top-level variables), 'run' (per-run variables), 'segment' (per-segment variables).

name.description: Canonical key used by rules/selectors/companions. snake_case. Example: 'colour_code', 'slat_size_mm', 'hinge_type'.

default_value_json.description: Default value, stored as JSONB. Can be any JSON type. null means 'no default'.

options_json.description: Allowed values for enum fields. Empty array [] for non-enum fields. Array items can be strings, numbers, or objects.

scope.description: Where this variable lives in the canonical payload.
